Notes: Goldey-Beacom wins 3rd straight game ... Lillian Chukwueze (GBC) scores
season-high 28 points (most by GBC player since Irene Hudson at Philadelphia
University on Jan. 26, 2012) ... Georgian Court suffers 2nd loss in a row.
Game.Officials: Kathy May,  Bobby Hope,  Karleena Tobin
